summary: Online medical store project for G&S Medical. Includes a customer-facing website and mobile app, plus an admin dashboard. Admin can add/customize products visible on both website and app. Payment page integrated with UPI ID gauravsaswade03@pingpay. Store details: customer care +91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454, email gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in, address At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Maharashtra-410405. Owners: Gaurav Saswade (CEO & Director, contact: +91 9270556455) & Shushant Waghmare. Multi-vendor marketplace feature planned: third-party sellers can register, get DigiLocker document verification (Aadhaar, PAN, medical shop license), and sell medicines on the platform with their own seller dashboard.
architectural_notes: Project has two separate codebases: website and mobile app — to be delivered as separate 7-zip archives
Admin dashboard manages product catalog shared across website and app
UPI payment integration using ID: gauravsaswade03@pingpay
Multi-vendor marketplace: third-party sellers register with DigiLocker verification (Aadhaar, PAN, medical shop license) before being allowed to sell
Admin dashboard login password changed to: p1love2g (no leading dot)
Email notifications for seller approval are unavailable on the current plan; in-dashboard notification system is used instead
known_issues: HomePage has duplicate G&S Medical name, customer care numbers, email, and address appearing more than once
ProductsPage and CartPage have duplicate customer care numbers, email address, and store address appearing more than once

existing_features.title: Create a visually rich, mobile-responsive customer-facing homepage for G&S Medical that includes: store logo/name 'G&S MEDICAL', hero banner with a pharmacy/health theme, featured product grid, navigation links (Home, Products, About Us, Contact, Cart), and a footer with all store details (customer care: +91 9270556455, email: gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in, address: At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Malavali, Maharashtra-410405).

Create a Product Catalog page that fetches and displays all products stored in the backend. Each product card should show product name, image, price, category, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Include category filter and search functionality.

Implement a shopping cart page where customers can view selected products, adjust quantities, remove items, and see a running total. Include a 'Proceed to Payment' button that navigates to the payment page.

Create a Payment page that displays the order summary and a UPI payment option. Show the UPI ID 'gauravsaswade03@pingpay' prominently with a QR code placeholder or a copyable UPI string. Include a form for the customer to enter their UPI transaction reference number to confirm payment, and a 'Place Order' button that submits the order to the backend.

Create a protected Admin Dashboard accessible via a dedicated '/admin' route. The dashboard must include: a sidebar with navigation (Dashboard Overview, Manage Products, View Orders), and a summary panel showing total products, total orders, and pending orders count.

Build a Product Management section within the Admin Dashboard that allows admin to: add new products (name, description, price, category, image URL, stock, availability), edit existing products, delete products, and see the full product list in a data table. Changes must reflect immediately on the customer-facing product catalog.

Build an Orders Management section within the Admin Dashboard that lists all customer orders with details (order ID, customer name, items, total, UPI ref, status). Allow admin to update order status (pending → confirmed → shipped → delivered).

Create an About Us page that includes: a section introducing the store G&S Medical, professional bios for owners Gaurav Saswade and Shushant Waghmare (highlight their dedication to healthcare, community service, and commitment to providing quality medicines at affordable prices), store mission statement, and contact details.

Create a Contact Us page displaying: customer care number +91 9270556455 (clickable tel link), email gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in (clickable mailto link), and full address: At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Malavali, Maharashtra-410405. Include a simple customer inquiry form (name, phone, message) that saves to backend.

Design and apply a consistent visual theme across the entire application: use a clean medical/health-inspired color palette (white, green tones, and a warm accent color — not blue or purple), modern sans-serif typography, card-based product layouts, smooth hover animations, and a professional pharmacy brand feel. The theme must be applied uniformly to all pages including admin dashboard.

Implement a mobile-app-like responsive layout optimized for small screens. Use a bottom navigation bar on mobile (Home, Products, Cart, Account), ensure all touch targets are appropriately sized, and ensure the entire UI works seamlessly on viewport widths from 320px to 1920px.

Save the uploaded photo of Gaurav Saswade (IMG_20250724_183425_656.webp) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/gaurav-saswade-photo.dim_400x400.jpg and use it as the profile photo for Gaurav Saswade in the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx), replacing any existing placeholder or previous image.
In the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx), update Gaurav Saswade's displayed title/role to 'CEO & Director'.

Create a dedicated Admin Login page at route '/admin/login'. The page must display a professional, branded login form with fields for email and password, a 'Login' button, and validation feedback. On successful credential verification via the backend adminLogin function, store the admin session in localStorage/sessionStorage and redirect to '/admin'. On failure, show a clear error message. If an unauthenticated user tries to access any '/admin/*' route, redirect them to '/admin/login' instead of showing the AccessDeniedScreen. Remove any previous Internet Identity-based admin guard and replace it with this credential-based guard.

Create a professional Customer Login / Registration page at route '/login'. The page must allow customers to register with name, phone, email, and password, and log in with email and password. Add backend functions `customerRegister` and `customerLogin` to store and verify customer credentials. On successful login, save the customer session and redirect to the previous page or homepage. Show the login/register page link in the Header and MobileBottomNav 'Account' tab, replacing or supplementing the Internet Identity button. The design must match the site's green medical theme and be fully mobile-responsive.

Enhance the Admin Dashboard overview page (AdminDashboardPage.tsx) with a visually improved layout. Display summary cards for: Total Products, Total Orders, Pending Orders, Confirmed Orders, Shipped Orders, Delivered Orders, and Total Revenue (sum of all order totals). Add a recent orders table showing the last 10 orders with order ID, customer name, total, status badge, and a quick-view button. Use color-coded status badges (pending=amber, confirmed=blue, shipped=purple, delivered=green). Apply the medical green theme consistently with card shadows and smooth hover effects.

Enhance the Admin Orders page (AdminOrdersPage.tsx) to clearly display payment status alongside order status. Each order row must show: Order ID, Customer Name, Phone, Items summary, Total Amount, UPI Transaction Reference, Payment Status (paid/unpaid derived from whether a UPI ref was provided), and Order Status with a colored badge. Add a 'Payment Status' filter (All / Paid / Unpaid) in addition to the existing status filter. Make the orders table sortable by date and amount. Ensure the OrderDetailsModal also prominently shows the UPI reference and payment status.

Add a Refund Management page at route '/admin/refunds' accessible from the admin sidebar. On the backend, add a `refunds` data store and expose functions: `requestRefund(orderId, reason, amount)`, `getRefunds()`, `updateRefundStatus(refundId, status)` where status can be: pending / approved / rejected / processed. On the frontend, display all refund requests in a table with columns: Refund ID, Order ID, Customer Name, Amount, Reason, Status, and Date. Allow the admin to approve, reject, or mark a refund as processed via a status dropdown or action buttons. Add a 'Refunds' navigation item to the AdminLayout sidebar.

Enhance the Admin Products page (AdminProductsPage.tsx) with an improved UI for adding and managing medicines. The product form (ProductForm.tsx) must include all existing fields (name, description, price, category, imageUrl, stock, isAvailable) plus a new 'Medicine Type' field (Tablet / Capsule / Syrup / Injection / Cream / Other) and a 'Requires Prescription' toggle. The data table must show a 'Medicine Type' column and a 'Prescription Required' badge. Update the backend Product type to include `medicineType: Text` and `requiresPrescription: Bool` fields with migration handling. The add/edit form must be presented as a clean full-screen modal on mobile.

Add +91 9766343454 as an additional customer care number in the Footer (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) alongside the existing +91 9270556455. Both numbers must be displayed as clickable tel: links under the customer care / contact section.

Add +91 9766343454 as an additional customer care number in the Contact Us page (frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx) alongside the existing +91 9270556455. Both numbers must appear in the phone/customer care info card as clickable tel: links.

In the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx), display +91 9270556455 as Gaurav Saswade's (CEO & Director) personal contact number. This number should appear in his bio/profile card as a clickable tel: link.

Update the OrderSuccessPage (frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx) to display both customer care numbers: +91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454, as clickable tel: links wherever contact details are shown.

Create a Seller Registration page at route '/seller/register'. The page must include a multi-step form: Step 1 — Store & Personal Info (store name, owner name, phone, email, password, confirm password); Step 2 — Document Verification (DigiLocker-style document upload section with clearly labeled fields for Aadhaar card number, PAN card number, and Medical Shop License number, each with a file upload input for the document image/PDF and a note that documents are verified via DigiLocker). Display a clear notice that the seller account will be reviewed and activated only after document verification and admin approval. On successful submission, show a confirmation screen stating 'Your application is under review.' The design must match the site's green medical theme and be fully mobile-responsive.

Create a Seller Login page at route '/seller/login'. Display a branded login form with email and password fields and a 'Login' button. On successful authentication via the sellerLogin backend function, store the seller session in localStorage and redirect to '/seller/dashboard'. On failure, show a clear error message. If the seller's verificationStatus is 'pending' or 'rejected', show an appropriate message ('Your account is under review.' or 'Your application was rejected. Please contact support.'). Include a link to '/seller/register' for new sellers. The design must match the site's green medical theme.

Create a Seller Dashboard at route '/seller/dashboard' accessible only to authenticated and verified sellers. The dashboard must include: a sidebar navigation with links to Dashboard Overview, My Products, My Orders, and My Profile; a dashboard overview showing total products listed, total orders received, and pending orders count; a 'My Products' section where the seller can add, edit, and delete their own products (same fields as admin product management: name, description, price, category, imageUrl, stock, isAvailable, medicineType, requiresPrescription) — products added by a seller must be stored with a sellerId reference and must appear on the customer-facing product catalog; a 'My Orders' section showing orders placed for the seller's products with order details and status; and a 'My Profile' section showing the seller's store info and document verification status. If an unauthenticated or unverified user accesses any '/seller/*' route, redirect them to '/seller/login'.

Add Seller login/register entry points to the customer-facing homepage (HomePage.tsx) and the Header (Header.tsx) near the existing customer login button. Add a clearly labeled 'Sell on G&S Medical' or 'Seller Portal' link/button that navigates to '/seller/login'. Also add the seller portal link to the MobileBottomNav or a visible location on mobile. The visual styling must match the site's green medical theme.

Add a Seller Management section to the Admin Dashboard, accessible from the AdminLayout sidebar as 'Manage Sellers' at route '/admin/sellers'. This page must display all registered sellers in a data table with columns: Seller ID, Store Name, Owner Name, Email, Phone, Aadhaar Number, PAN Number, Medical License Number, Verification Status (badge: pending=amber, verified=green, rejected=red), and Date Registered. Admin must be able to approve (set to 'verified') or reject a seller application using action buttons or a status dropdown directly on the table row. Include a search/filter by verification status.

Enhance the Customer Login / Registration page (frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx) to add OTP-based two-step verification for both login and registration flows. After the user submits their credentials (email + password on login, or all registration fields on signup), show an OTP input step: display the customer's registered phone number (partially masked), call generateOtp with the phone number, show the 6-digit OTP on-screen in a clearly marked 'Your OTP' field (simulating SMS delivery since external SMS is unavailable), present an OTP input field, and a 'Verify OTP' button. On successful verifyOtp call, complete the login/registration. If OTP is wrong or expired, display a clear error and allow retry. Include a 'Resend OTP' button that calls generateOtp again. The design must match the site's green medical theme and be fully mobile-responsive.

Enhance the Seller Login page (frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx) to add OTP-based two-step verification. After the seller submits valid email and password credentials, show an OTP verification step: call generateOtp with the seller's registered phone number, display the OTP on-screen in a 'Your OTP' field (simulated delivery), show the seller's phone number partially masked, present an OTP input field and a 'Verify OTP' button. On successful verifyOtp, complete the login and redirect to '/seller/dashboard'. If OTP is incorrect or expired, show a clear error. Include a 'Resend OTP' button. The design must match the site's green medical theme.

Enhance the Seller Registration page (frontend/src/pages/SellerRegisterPage.tsx) to add OTP verification as a new step (Step 3) before final form submission. After Step 2 (document details), call generateOtp with the phone number entered in Step 1, display the OTP on-screen in a 'Your OTP' field, show the phone number partially masked, present an OTP input field and 'Verify & Submit' button. Only after successful OTP verification, submit the registration form to the backend. Include a 'Resend OTP' button and show appropriate error messages for wrong or expired OTPs. The design must match the site's green medical theme.

In the AdminLayout sidebar (frontend/src/components/AdminLayout.tsx), add a numeric badge next to the 'Manage Sellers' navigation link that displays the count of sellers with verificationStatus === 'pending'. The badge must use the amber color to match the pending status theme and update reactively whenever the sellers list changes.

On the Admin Sellers page (frontend/src/pages/AdminSellersPage.tsx), add a prominent alert/banner panel at the top of the page that highlights unreviewed (pending) seller registrations. The panel must show the number of pending applications, a brief message such as 'X new seller applications are awaiting your review', and visually stand out using an amber/warning color scheme consistent with the medical green theme.

Strengthen the approve/reject workflow on AdminSellersPage so that: (a) approving a seller sets their verificationStatus to 'verified' and their isActive flag to true, granting them permission to list products on the platform; (b) rejecting a seller sets verificationStatus to 'rejected' and isActive to false, blocking them from listing products. Ensure the backend functions updateSellerVerificationStatus and any isActive update are called correctly and the UI reflects the new status immediately after the action.

On the Seller Login page (frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx), after a seller successfully authenticates with valid credentials and OTP, check the seller's verificationStatus and isActive flag and display the appropriate feedback message before completing login: if verificationStatus is 'verified' and isActive is true, proceed to redirect to '/seller/dashboard'; if verificationStatus is 'pending', show the message 'Your account is under review. Please wait for admin approval.'; if verificationStatus is 'rejected', show the message 'Your application was rejected. Please contact support at +91 9270556455 or gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in.' Do not redirect to the dashboard in either blocked case.

Add rich entrance animations and micro-interactions across all customer-facing pages (HomePage, ProductsPage, CartPage, PaymentPage, OrderSuccessPage, AboutPage, ContactPage). Use staggered fade-in + slide-up for page sections and cards on mount, smooth scale/shadow transitions on card hover, animated counters for stats/numbers, and a subtle parallax or gradient-shift effect on hero banners. Ensure all animations respect reduced-motion preferences.

Apply a polished, design-complete visual overhaul to the HomePage: add a full-screen animated hero section with a layered gradient background (deep green to teal tones), floating decorative pill/capsule SVG shapes that drift slowly, a bold headline with a typewriter or word-reveal animation, and a prominent CTA button with a ripple/pulse effect. Add a smooth-scrolling marquee or ticker strip for announcements (e.g., 'Free delivery on orders above ₹500 · Genuine medicines guaranteed · 24/7 customer support'). Upgrade the featured products section with a horizontal scroll carousel on mobile.

Apply a polished, design-complete visual overhaul to the ProductsPage: add animated skeleton loaders while products fetch, add a sticky filter/search bar with a smooth slide-down appearance on scroll, animate product cards into a grid with staggered delays, and add a floating 'scroll to top' button that fades in after scrolling down.

Apply a polished, design-complete visual overhaul to the CartPage and PaymentPage: animate cart item rows on add/remove (slide-in from right, slide-out to left), add a smooth animated order total that updates with a number-flip or counter transition when quantities change, and give the UPI payment section a highlighted card with a pulsing green border/glow and a copy-to-clipboard animation on the UPI ID.

Apply a polished, design-complete visual overhaul to the OrderSuccessPage: replace the static layout with a celebratory full-screen success animation (a large animated checkmark SVG drawn on screen, confetti or particle burst, and a fade-in order summary card). Add smooth transitions when navigating away.

Apply rich animations and a polished layout to all authentication pages (CustomerLoginPage, AdminLoginPage, SellerLoginPage, SellerRegisterPage): add an animated split-screen or full-bleed background with a soft animated gradient on the left/top panel featuring the G&S Medical brand, smooth slide transitions between form steps (login ↔ register, step 1 → step 2 → OTP step), animated input focus states with a green underline sweep, and a shake animation on form validation errors.

Apply rich animations and a polished layout to the Admin Dashboard (AdminDashboardPage, AdminProductsPage, AdminOrdersPage, AdminRefundsPage, AdminSellersPage): animate stat cards entering with a bounce or pop effect on load, add animated number counters for all numeric stats, add row highlight animations when order/seller status is updated, and add a smooth slide-in animation for the AdminLayout sidebar on mobile. Upgrade the AdminLayout sidebar with gradient background (dark green tones), icon badges with pulse animations for pending items, and active link indicator with a sliding underline or left-border sweep.

Apply rich animations and a polished layout to the Seller Dashboard and all Seller pages (SellerDashboardPage, SellerProductsPage, SellerOrdersPage, SellerProfilePage): replicate the same staggered card entrance animations, animated counters, and polished sidebar styling (gradient green, animated active link indicator) as the Admin Dashboard. Add a welcome banner at the top of the Seller Dashboard with the seller's store name and a subtle animated greeting illustration (e.g., a small pharmacy/store icon).

Enhance the Header and Footer with animation and design polish: add a smooth slide-down entrance for the Header on page load, add an animated cart badge that bounces/pulses when items are added, add a gradient green top border or bottom shadow to the Header, and add a subtle wave or diagonal-cut top edge to the Footer with a richer background (dark green gradient). Add hover underline-sweep animations on all navigation links.

Apply rich animations and a polished layout to the AboutPage and ContactPage: add animated timeline or card reveal effects for owner bios (slide in from alternating sides), add a parallax background layer in the hero/header sections, animate the ContactPage info cards with staggered entrance, and add a smooth success animation (checkmark + fade) when the contact inquiry form is submitted successfully.

In the About Us page (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx), display +91 9156896495 as Shushant Waghmare's (co-founder) personal contact number. This number should appear in his bio/profile card as a clickable tel: link, styled consistently with Gaurav Saswade's contact number display.

Audit and remove all duplicate contact information within the same page or section across the entire frontend. Specifically: (1) In Footer.tsx, ensure each phone number (+91 9270556455, +91 9766343454), the email address, and the store address each appear exactly once. (2) In ContactPage.tsx, ensure each phone number, the email, and the address each appear exactly once within the contact info cards section. (3) In AboutPage.tsx, ensure Gaurav Saswade's phone number (+91 9270556455) appears only in his profile/bio card and not repeated elsewhere on the same page; ensure Shushant Waghmare's phone number (+91 9156896495) appears only in his profile/bio card. (4) In OrderSuccessPage.tsx, ensure +91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454 each appear exactly once. (5) In HomePage.tsx, ensure no contact detail, phone number, or address is repeated within any single section. Review all other pages and components for any within-page duplication of the same data point and eliminate it so each piece of information is shown exactly once per page.

Audit the Header (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) desktop navigation and ensure each navigation link (Home, Products, About Us, Contact, Cart, Login, Seller Portal) appears exactly once. Remove any duplicate nav items or buttons that appear more than once within the same navigation bar or menu section.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, audit every section of the page and ensure the store name 'G&S MEDICAL' appears only once (in the hero/header area). Remove all additional duplicate occurrences of the store name from any other sections such as the featured products section, stats section, or any other repeated block.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, audit all sections and ensure each customer care phone number (+91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454) appears at most once. Remove any duplicate phone number entries found in banners, footers-within-page, contact sections, or any other repeated locations on the same page.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, audit all sections and ensure the store email address (gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in) appears at most once. Remove any duplicate email entries from banners, contact blocks, or any other sections that repeat the same email on the same page.

In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, audit all sections and ensure the store address (At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Malavali, Maharashtra-410405) appears at most once. Remove any duplicate address entries from banners, info cards, contact blocks, or any other repeated areas on the same page.

In frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx, audit all sections and ensure each customer care phone number (+91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454), the store email address (gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in), and the store address (At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Malavali, Maharashtra-410405) each appear at most once on the page. Remove all duplicate occurrences so each piece of contact information is shown exactly once.

In frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx, audit all sections and ensure each customer care phone number (+91 9270556455 and +91 9766343454), the store email address (gauravsaswade@gsgroupswebstore.in), and the store address (At-Bhaje, Post-Malavali, Tal-Maval, Dist-Pune, Near Malavali Railway Station, Malavali, Maharashtra-410405) each appear at most once on the page. Remove all duplicate occurrences so each piece of contact information is shown exactly once.

Apply deeper, more expressive entrance and transition animations to all customer-facing pages (HomePage, ProductsPage, CartPage, PaymentPage, OrderSuccessPage, AboutPage, ContactPage). Each page must have a unique animation personality: HomePage uses cascading hero reveals with morphing gradient orbs; ProductsPage uses a wave-stagger grid entrance; CartPage uses spring-physics item rows; PaymentPage uses a progressive step-reveal; OrderSuccessPage uses a particle-burst celebration; AboutPage uses alternating slide-in bio cards with parallax depth; ContactPage uses a ripple entrance for info cards. No two pages should share the same animation pattern. All animations must respect prefers-reduced-motion.

Apply a richer, more unique visual design language to each authentication page (CustomerLoginPage, AdminLoginPage, SellerLoginPage, SellerRegisterPage). Each must have a distinct illustrated or decorative background panel that is visually different from the others: CustomerLoginPage uses floating medicine capsule illustrations on a soft green gradient; AdminLoginPage uses a dark deep-green geometric grid pattern with a subtle glow; SellerLoginPage uses a storefront/shop illustration motif; SellerRegisterPage uses a document/verification theme with step-progress indicators styled as a visual timeline. Smooth slide-in transitions between form steps must use different easing curves per page. Input focus states must animate with a sweeping green underline unique per page type.

Apply a visually distinct and richer design to the Admin Dashboard pages (AdminDashboardPage, AdminProductsPage, AdminOrdersPage, AdminRefundsPage, AdminSellersPage). Each page must have a unique header illustration or accent graphic: Dashboard overview gets a data-viz inspired top banner with mini sparkline shapes; Products page gets a medicine-grid mosaic accent; Orders page gets a delivery-flow timeline graphic; Refunds page gets a coin/wallet accent illustration; Sellers page gets a verified-badge/shield motif. Stat cards must use glassmorphism-style with a frosted green tint, animated shimmer on load, and a bounce-pop entrance staggered per card. Table rows must highlight with a smooth green-tint sweep when status changes. The AdminLayout sidebar must use a deep gradient (dark forest green to emerald), with active link showing a glowing left-border indicator and pending-item badges pulsing with a ring animation.

Apply a visually distinct and richer animated design to all Seller Dashboard pages (SellerDashboardPage, SellerProductsPage, SellerOrdersPage, SellerProfilePage). SellerDashboardPage must open with a full-width animated welcome banner showing the seller's store name with a typewriter reveal and a small animated pharmacy-store SVG icon. SellerProductsPage uses a card-mosaic entrance with color-accent top borders unique to medicine categories. SellerOrdersPage uses a timeline-style list view for orders (not a plain table) with animated status step indicators. SellerProfilePage shows a profile card with an animated verification status badge (spinning ring while pending, pop-in checkmark when verified). The SellerLayout sidebar must mirror the Admin sidebar's gradient styling but use a slightly lighter emerald-to-teal tone to visually distinguish seller from admin context.

Upgrade the Header and Footer with richer, more distinctive animated design. The Header must display a multicolor gradient top accent bar (deep green → emerald → teal, animating slowly) on scroll, a frosted-glass blur effect on the navbar background when scrolled, and a morphing logo text effect on hover. The cart badge must burst-animate (scale pop + color flash) when an item is added. All desktop nav links must have an animated underline that slides in from the left on hover. The Footer must feature a more elaborate SVG wave top edge with two layered wave paths at different opacities, a starfield or subtle dot-grid background texture, and footer navigation links with a fade-slide-up hover effect. No design element in the Header or Footer should duplicate any animation used on page bodies.

Add a 3D card-flip reveal animation to the ProductCard component (frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx): when a product card enters the viewport for the first time, it performs a single Y-axis flip (0deg → 360deg) over 600 ms using CSS perspective transform before settling into its normal face-up state. This flip must be triggered by IntersectionObserver and must be distinct from all existing fade-in, slide-up, scale, tilt, and liquid-fill animations already on product cards.

Add a neon-pulse glow ring around the hero CTA button on the HomePage (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx): a continuously animated double-ring halo in emerald and teal alternates opacity (0.3 → 0.8 → 0.3) on a 2-second loop, giving the button a living, breathing glow. This must be implemented with CSS keyframes distinct from the existing ripple/pulse effect already on the CTA.

Add an animated SVG drawing effect to the G&S MEDICAL logo text in the Header (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx): on first page load, the logo letters are rendered as SVG stroke paths that draw themselves (stroke-dashoffset animation) from left to right over 1 second before filling with the final brand color. On subsequent navigations, the logo is shown instantly without re-animating. This must be distinct from the existing morphing logo text hover effect.

Add an animated gradient mesh background to the PaymentPage (frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx): render a full-page background layer of 4–5 softly animated radial gradient nodes in deep green and warm amber tones that drift slowly and smoothly, creating a living mesh effect behind all page content. This background must be unique to the PaymentPage and must not reuse the morphing blob or floating pill shapes used on the HomePage.

Add a 'staggered letter-drop' entrance animation to all prominent section headings on the AboutPage (frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx): each letter in the heading falls from 30px above its final position with a slight spring overshoot, staggered 30 ms per letter. This technique must be visually and technically distinct from the word-reveal clip-path technique used on Seller Dashboard pages and the typewriter character animation used in the welcome banner.

Add a dynamic particle trail to the cursor on all Seller Dashboard pages (SellerDashboardPage, SellerProductsPage, SellerOrdersPage, SellerProfilePage): small teal dot particles (4–6 px) spawn at the cursor position, float upward, and fade out over 600 ms as the cursor moves. Limit to desktop (pointer: fine) only. This effect must be distinct from the admin cursor spotlight radial glow already implemented on admin pages.

Add an animated 'heartbeat' pulse to the pharmacy cross / logo icon in the SellerDashboardPage welcome banner: the pharmacy-store SVG icon pulses with a heartbeat-style double-beat scale animation (1.0 → 1.15 → 1.0 → 1.15 → 1.0) on a 2-second loop. This must be a new keyframe distinct from the existing spin, pop-in checkmark, and bounce-pop entrance animations already used in seller pages.

Add an animated stats counter with an odometer/rolling-digit effect to all numeric stat displays on the AdminDashboardPage (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.tsx): when stat cards enter the viewport, each digit rolls upward through 0–9 before landing on the final value, like a mechanical odometer. This must be a new implementation distinct from the existing simple linear animated counter hook (useAnimatedCounter.ts) already used on admin pages.

Add a unique 'typewriter with highlight' animation to the ContactPage (frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx) hero/header section title: the heading types out character by character (reusing TypewriterText component behavior is allowed for the character reveal), but each completed word briefly flashes a green highlight background that fades out over 300 ms before the next word starts typing. This highlight-flash is the unique additive layer that distinguishes it from the plain typewriter already used elsewhere.

Add a 'shimmer reveal' entrance to all data table rows on AdminOrdersPage, AdminRefundsPage, and AdminSellersPage: when the table first loads or when new data arrives, each row shimmers in from left-to-right with a traveling light sweep (not a fade or slide), staggered 40 ms per row. This shimmer row-reveal must be distinct from the existing green-tint status-change sweep and the glassmorphism card shimmer already applied to admin pages.

Add a floating 'quick-add' micro-animation to the ProductsPage (frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx): when a user clicks 'Add to Cart' on any product card, a small ghost copy of the product image detaches from the card and flies in an arc toward the cart icon in the Header, scaling down and fading out as it reaches the target. This 'fly-to-cart' animation must be unique and distinct from all existing button, badge, or entrance animations.

Add a 'magnetic ripple' hover effect to all primary action buttons (Add to Cart, Place Order, Login, Register, Verify OTP, Approve, Reject) across the entire application: on hover, a soft radial ripple ring expands outward from the cursor contact point within the button boundary using a CSS clip-path and pseudo-element technique. This must be visually distinct from the existing liquid-fill sweep, ripple/pulse CTA effect, and ink-drop ripple already applied to badges and cart.

Add an animated 'breathing' background to the AdminLoginPage: the deep-green geometric grid pattern already on the page gains a slow pulsing brightness modulation (opacity oscillates between 0.4 and 0.7 on an 8-second loop) so the grid appears to breathe. Overlay 3–4 very faint (5–8% opacity) slowly rotating conic-gradient rings centered in the panel. These rings must be distinct from the morphing blobs on HomePage, the mesh nodes on PaymentPage, and all existing auth page decorative panels.

Add a 'card tilt depth shadow' effect to all stat/summary cards on the AdminDashboardPage, SellerDashboardPage, and all their sub-pages: as the user moves their cursor over a stat card, the card casts a directional drop-shadow that shifts position relative to cursor angle (shadow moves opposite to cursor direction), creating a 3D light-source illusion. This must be implemented with JavaScript mouse-enter/move/leave listeners updating CSS custom properties and must not duplicate the existing bounce-pop entrance, glassmorphism shimmer, or magnetic tilt on product cards.

Introduce a 'text scramble' reveal animation for all numeric order IDs, product IDs, and refund IDs shown in admin and seller data tables: when a row first renders, the ID text rapidly cycles through random alphanumeric characters for 400 ms before resolving to the real value, like a decryption effect. Use a JavaScript character-scramble loop on mount. This must be distinct from the odometer digit-roll, typewriter character-reveal, and shimmer-row-reveal effects already applied.

Add a 'spotlight follow' hover effect to the SellerRegisterPage step-progress timeline indicators: as the user hovers over or focuses each step node, a soft amber spotlight radial gradient (80 px radius, 15% opacity) follows the cursor within the timeline area and snaps to the hovered step with a smooth 200 ms transition. This must be distinct from the admin cursor spotlight (emerald) and the seller cursor particle trail (teal dots), using amber to match the document/verification theme of the page.

Add an animated 'wave underline' to all section sub-headings (h2, h3) on the customer-facing AboutPage and ContactPage: a wavy SVG underline path draws itself beneath each heading when it enters the viewport using stroke-dashoffset animation over 600 ms. The wave underline must be emerald-colored and use a sinusoidal SVG path. This must be distinct from the staggered letter-drop on AboutPage headings (which targets h1 and prominent titles) and the hover underline-sweep on nav links.

Add a 'price tag flip' micro-animation to product prices on the ProductsPage and in the CartPage: when the page first loads or when a price enters the viewport, the price number flips in with a Y-axis rotateY(90deg → 0deg) over 350 ms per item using CSS 3D transform. In the CartPage, when a quantity is changed, the recalculated line-item price also plays this flip-in to signal the update. This must be distinct from the existing spring-physics row animations in CartPage, the number-flip counter transition on order totals, and the odometer digit-roll on admin stats.

Add a 'glowing category pill' effect to the category filter buttons on the ProductsPage: when a category filter is active/selected, the pill button emits a soft pulsing outer glow (box-shadow expands and contracts on a 1.5-second loop) in the category's accent color (green for medicines, amber for generics, teal for others). When switching categories, the active pill transitions with a cross-fade glow transfer to the newly selected pill. This must be distinct from the existing sticky filter bar slide-down and the neon-pulse glow ring on the homepage CTA.

Add an animated 'order timeline stepper' to the OrderSuccessPage below the order summary card: a horizontal (desktop) or vertical (mobile) stepper showing the 4 order stages — Order Placed → Confirmed → Shipped → Delivered — where 'Order Placed' is pre-filled and highlighted, and the remaining steps are shown as upcoming. Each step node animates in sequentially with a 200 ms stagger after the confetti burst completes. This is additive to the existing confetti/checkmark celebration and must not replace or duplicate it.

Add a 'frosted glass notification toast' system upgrade: replace or enhance the existing toast notifications (used throughout admin and seller dashboards) with a custom frosted-glass styled toast that slides in from the top-right with a spring-bounce entrance (translateY(-20px) → translateY(4px) → translateY(0)), has a thin animated green progress bar at the bottom indicating auto-dismiss countdown, and fades out with a blur-to-transparent exit. The toast background must use backdrop-filter blur with a semi-transparent green-tinted surface. This is distinct from all existing page-entrance and overlay animations.

Introduce a vibrant multi-color accent system across all customer-facing pages (HomePage, ProductsPage, CartPage, PaymentPage, OrderSuccessPage, AboutPage, ContactPage): replace any remaining monochromatic green surfaces with rich gradient fills that blend emerald, teal, amber, and coral/rose accent tones. Section dividers, card borders, and icon backgrounds must each carry a distinct hue from this palette. No two adjacent sections should share the same dominant color.

Add animated gradient border rings to all product cards on ProductsPage and the featured product grid on HomePage: each card has a slowly rotating conic-gradient border (360° rotation over 4 seconds) visible on hover, cycling through emerald → teal → amber hues. This must be a CSS-only @keyframes technique using a pseudo-element border overlay and must not conflict with the existing 3D card-flip, magnetic tilt, or liquid-fill animations.

Add a color-burst splash animation to the Add to Cart button on ProductCard: on click, a spray of 8–10 tiny colored dots (mixed emerald, teal, and amber) burst radially outward from the button center, travel 30–50 px, and fade out over 500 ms. Implement using DOM-appended elements with CSS animation. This must be distinct from the existing liquid-fill sweep, magnetic ripple, and fly-to-cart image animations.

Introduce a dynamic hero gradient shift on the HomePage hero section: the layered gradient background smoothly transitions through a looping color sequence (deep green → teal → emerald → forest green) over a 12-second CSS animation cycle, creating a living color-shift effect. The hue shift must be implemented via CSS @keyframes on background-position or hue-rotate and must be visually distinct from the existing floating blob morph and floating pill shapes.

Add a colorful animated step-progress bar to the multi-step forms (SellerRegisterPage step indicator and CustomerLoginPage login/register/OTP tabs): the progress bar fills from left to right as the user advances steps, using a gradient that shifts from amber (step 1) to emerald (step 2) to teal (step 3). The fill transition between steps uses a smooth 400 ms ease animation. This is distinct from the existing spotlight-follow hover on step nodes and the slide-in form transitions.

Add a vibrant animated status-color aura to each order status badge in the OrderSuccessPage timeline stepper and in the CartPage/PaymentPage order summary: the active/completed step node pulses with a colored aura matching its status color (emerald for delivered, teal for shipped, amber for confirmed, rose for pending). The aura expands and fades on a 1.8-second loop using CSS box-shadow keyframes. This must be distinct from the existing ink-drop ripple on StatusBadge and the pulsing ring badge animation on admin sidebar items.

Apply a colorful icon tinting system to the AdminDashboardPage and SellerDashboardPage stat cards: each stat card's icon is rendered with a unique vivid background pill — Total Products uses an amber pill, Total Orders uses a teal pill, Pending Orders uses a rose/coral pill, Revenue uses an emerald pill, Delivered Orders uses a cyan pill. The pill background uses a soft radial gradient and has a subtle color-shift hover animation (brightness +10%). This must complement the existing glassmorphism frosted-green card style without replacing it.

Add a rainbow-gradient animated highlight to the AnnouncementTicker text items: each announcement phrase is wrapped in a span whose text color cycles through a green → teal → amber → green gradient using a CSS background-clip text animation over a 6-second loop. The animation phase is offset by 2 seconds per item so adjacent phrases are never the same color simultaneously. This must not reuse the existing shimmer sweep background animation already applied to the AnnouncementTicker background.

Add a colorful animated category-icon badge to each medicine category displayed across ProductsPage filter pills and product cards: Tablet gets a violet-tinted icon pill, Capsule gets a rose-tinted pill, Syrup gets a cyan-tinted pill, Injection gets an amber-tinted pill, Cream gets a lime-tinted pill, Other gets a slate pill. Each icon badge animates into view with a scale-in bounce (scale 0 → 1.1 → 1.0, 300 ms) when first rendered. This color-coding must be applied consistently on both the filter pills and the medicine type badge inside ProductCard.

Add a vivid animated gradient shimmer to the Footer's brand name 'G&S MEDICAL' text: the text uses a background-clip gradient that sweeps a bright teal-to-amber highlight across the letters on a 3-second loop, giving the brand name a metallic sheen appearance. Also apply a matching but shorter (1.5-second) gradient sweep to the footer section headings (Quick Links, Contact Us, etc.). These must use the CSS background-clip: text technique with @keyframes background-position animation and must not reuse the SVG stroke draw animation on the Header logo.

Revert the entire application (both frontend and backend) to the state it was in at Version 9, discarding all changes made in Versions 10 through the current latest version. The codebase must exactly reflect Version 9's functionality, design, and data models with no residual code, styles, or logic from any later version.

new_feature_requests.summary: Customer-facing website for G&S Medical online store with attractive design
Mobile app for G&S Medical online store with attractive design
Admin dashboard with ability to add and customize products (reflected on both website and app)
Payment page integrated with UPI ID gauravsaswade03@pingpay
Store info page: customer care +91 9270556455, email, address, and owner profiles for Gaurav Saswade & Shushant Waghmare

Build a backend data model and API for Products. Each product must store: id, name, description, price, category, imageUrl, stock quantity, and isAvailable flag. Expose functions: addProduct, updateProduct, deleteProduct, getProducts, getProductById.

Build a backend data model and API for Orders. Each order must store: id, customerName, customerPhone, customerAddress, items (list of productId + quantity + price), totalAmount, upiTransactionRef, status (pending/confirmed/shipped/delivered), and createdAt timestamp. Expose functions: placeOrder, getOrders, getOrderById, updateOrderStatus.
Update Gaurav Saswade's profile photo on the About Us page with a user-provided photo
Update Gaurav Saswade's title/role on the About Us page to 'CEO & Director'
Add protected admin login page with credentials (email: gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com, password: :p1love2g). No one can access admin dashboard without logging in.
Enhance admin dashboard: improved orders view, add medicines/products management, payment status visibility, and a refund management page.
Add a professional customer login/registration page on the customer-facing website.

Add a backend authentication system for admin login. Store a single hardcoded admin credential (email: gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com, password: :p1love2g). Expose a backend function `adminLogin(email: Text, password: Text) : async Bool` that returns true only when both match. Also store and manage admin session state so the frontend can verify admin status.

Add +91 9766343454 as an additional customer care number across all relevant pages (Contact Us, Footer, etc.) and set +91 9270556455 as the CEO Gaurav Saswade's personal contact number on the About Us page.
Add multi-vendor seller feature: seller signup/login page (linked from homepage near customer login), seller profile creation, and a seller dashboard for managing their products and orders.

Seller registration must require DigiLocker-based document verification: Aadhaar card, PAN card, and medical shop license. Only verified sellers are granted permission to list and sell medicines on the platform.
Add seller management section in the admin dashboard to view registered sellers, their verification status, and approve/reject seller accounts.

Add a backend data model and API for Sellers. Each seller record must store: id, storeName, ownerName, email, phone, passwordHash, aadhaarNumber, panNumber, medicalLicenseNumber, verificationStatus (pending / verified / rejected), isActive flag, and createdAt timestamp. Expose backend functions: sellerRegister(storeName, ownerName, email, phone, password, aadhaarNumber, panNumber, medicalLicenseNumber) returning a Result with seller id or error; sellerLogin(email, password) returning Bool; getSellerById(id); getSellers() for admin use; updateSellerVerificationStatus(sellerId, status) for admin use; getSellerProducts(sellerId); and getSellerOrders(sellerId).

Update the backend Product type to include a sellerId field (type: ?Text, optional) to associate products with a specific seller. Products without a sellerId belong to the main G&S Medical store. Existing products must retain their data without modification (migration safe). The getProducts function must return all products regardless of sellerId so they all appear on the customer-facing catalog. Add a getSellerProducts(sellerId: Text) function to return only products belonging to a specific seller.
Add OTP verification (two-step authentication) to the seller and customer login/signup pages

Add a backend OTP store and expose the following functions: `generateOtp(phone: Text) : async Text` — generates a 6-digit numeric OTP, stores it with a 5-minute expiry keyed by phone number, and returns it (to be sent via UI simulation since SMS is not available); `verifyOtp(phone: Text, otp: Text) : async Bool` — checks the stored OTP against the provided value and expiry, invalidates it after a successful match, and returns true/false. OTPs must expire after 5 minutes and be single-use.

Update the hardcoded admin password in the backend from ':p1love2g' to 'p1love2g' (remove the leading colon). The adminLogin function must accept email 'gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com' and password 'p1love2g' and return true only when both match exactly.

Update the hardcoded admin password in the backend (backend/main.mo and backend/migration.mo) from ':p1love2g' to 'p1love2g' (removing the leading colon). The adminLogin function must accept email 'gauravsaswade2009@gmail.com' and password 'p1love2g' and return true only when both match exactly.

Add pending seller badge in admin sidebar showing count of new applications, new applications alert panel on Manage Sellers page, approve/reject workflow granting/blocking product listing permission, and seller status feedback messages on login (approved/rejected). No email notifications (unavailable on current plan).
Enhance the overall UI/UX with more animations, richer visual design, and polished full-page layouts across the entire application (customer site, seller pages, admin dashboard).
Add +91 9156896495 as the co-founder (Shushant Waghmare) personal contact number on the About Us page

Ensure no information is repeated across the site — each piece of contact info, address, phone number, or other detail should appear only once in its appropriate location, no duplicates within the same section or page.
Ensure menu/navigation buttons are not duplicated — each nav item should appear only once per navigation bar or menu section, with no repeated buttons across header, footer, or mobile nav.
Audit the MobileBottomNav (frontend/src/components/MobileBottomNav.tsx) and ensure each navigation item (Home, Products, Cart, Account) appears exactly once. Remove any duplicate entries.

Audit the Footer (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) quick navigation links section and ensure each navigation link (Home, Products, About Us, Contact, etc.) appears exactly once within the footer nav. Remove any duplicate link entries.
On the HomePage, remove all duplicate instances of G&S Medical name, customer care numbers, email, and address — each piece of information should appear exactly once.
In ProductsPage and CartPage, ensure customer care numbers, email address, and store address each appear exactly once — remove all duplicate instances.
Make the entire application more animative and design-rich without repeating any design patterns already applied — every new animation or visual element must be unique and additive

Apply a new layer of unique, non-repeating micro-interaction animations to all customer-facing product cards (ProductCard.tsx) and the cart badge: add a magnetic hover tilt effect on product cards (subtle 3D perspective rotation following cursor), a liquid fill progress animation on the 'Add to Cart' button that sweeps green from left to right on click, and a numerical increment burst on the cart badge each time a new item is added. None of these animations must duplicate any existing hover, scale, or slide-up patterns already applied.

Introduce a page-transition overlay system: when navigating between any two pages, display a brief (200–300 ms) branded curtain wipe animation (a vertical green panel that sweeps in from the left edge and immediately sweeps out to the right) before the new page renders. This must be applied globally via the Layout component and must not conflict with or duplicate existing fade-in/slide-up entrance animations already on individual pages.

Add a dynamic scrolling progress indicator: a thin (3–4 px) emerald-to-teal gradient line at the very top of the viewport (above the Header accent bar) that fills from 0% to 100% width as the user scrolls down any page and resets on navigation. This is distinct from any existing top-border, accent bar, or underline animation already on the Header.

Enhance the AnnouncementTicker (AnnouncementTicker.tsx) with a visually richer design: replace the plain scrolling strip with a frosted-glass pill-shaped ticker that has a soft inner glow, individual announcement items separated by animated dot-pulse dividers, and a subtle shimmer sweep across the background every 4 seconds. This must not reuse any animation from the existing marquee scroll or any page-body entrance animation.

Add a floating ambient background layer to the HomePage hero section: render 6–8 large, very low-opacity (3–6%) morphing blob shapes in deep green and teal that slowly deform and drift using an SVG feTurbulence or CSS border-radius keyframe morph. These blobs must be layered behind all hero content and must be visually distinct from the existing floating pill/capsule SVG shapes already in the hero.

Implement an interactive cursor spotlight effect on the Admin Dashboard pages (AdminDashboardPage, AdminProductsPage, AdminOrdersPage, AdminRefundsPage, AdminSellersPage): a radial gradient glow that follows the mouse cursor across the page background, with a soft 200 px radius emerald glow. This must only activate on desktop (pointer: fine) and must be a new visual layer not shared with any existing glassmorphism, shimmer, or gradient animation already applied to admin pages.

Add a staggered text word-reveal animation to all major page headings (h1 and prominent section titles) across the Seller Dashboard pages (SellerDashboardPage, SellerProductsPage, SellerOrdersPage, SellerProfilePage): each word in the heading splits and reveals upward from a clip-path mask with a 60 ms stagger per word. This must use a clip-path reveal technique that is distinct from the existing typewriter character-by-character animation already used in the welcome banner.

Add a unique 'ink-drop' ripple animation to the StatusBadge component (StatusBadge.tsx): whenever a badge's status value changes (e.g., order status updated from pending to confirmed), the badge plays a concentric-ring ink-drop ripple expanding outward from its center before settling on the new color. This is distinct from the existing green-tint table row sweep and pulsing ring badge animations already applied.

Apply a unique visual treatment to the SkeletonProductCard component (SkeletonProductCard.tsx): replace the current shimmer with a scan-line animation — a single bright horizontal line that sweeps top-to-bottom repeatedly over a dark-tinted skeleton, giving a medical-scanner aesthetic. This scan-line must use a different keyframe from the existing shimmer/gradient sweep used on admin glassmorphism cards.

Add a floating action button (FAB) to the CartPage with a unique spring-bounce entrance animation: the FAB appears in the bottom-right corner only when the cart has items, reveals with a spring overshoot bounce (scale 0 → 1.2 → 1.0), and shows a quick-checkout icon. On click it scrolls to the checkout summary section. This FAB must be visually and animatively distinct from the existing ScrollToTopButton component.

Make the entire application even more animative and design-rich (another layer on top of existing animations) — add new unique animations and visual enhancements across all pages without repeating existing patterns

Make the entire application even more animative and design-rich (another layer on top of existing animations) — add new unique animations and visual enhancements across all pages without repeating existing patterns
Make the entire application more colorful and animative — add new vibrant color accents, richer gradients, and more dynamic animations across all pages without repeating existing patterns
